classes.reasoning: This is an email thread export discussing protocol amendment approval, site readiness, and operational logistics. It is an internal administrative communication about a trial, not a regulated trial document itself (not a protocol, ICF, CSR, IB, CRF, or any other defined eTMF category).

indication: Cardiovascular disease requiring lipid-lowering therapy (high LDL-C levels)
summary: An email thread among Biorce clinical operations staff regarding Central Ethics Committee approval of Amendment 1 to Protocol BIORCE-CAR-2024-007. The emails discuss protocol changes (eligibility criteria for LDL-C levels, country addition of Belgium, sample size unchanged at 360), local ethics committee submission status across six sites (Spain, Germany, Netherlands, Poland, Belgium), and operational instructions to sites. This is an administrative export, not a formal trial document.
references_to: Central Ethics Committee approval dated 09 July 2024
